title: California Traffic Collision Analysis
description: PySpark-based traffic safety analysis of California collision data covering severity, weather, lighting, geography, and time trends.
insights: Found that traffic volume is the dominant driver of collision frequency, with clear weather present in 80%+ of incidents.
Identified Friday and 15:00-18:00 as high-risk time windows.
Showed that poor lighting acts as a severity multiplier even when it is not the main frequency driver.
